allow: PowerShell($body = '{"email":"caio@barbearia.com","senha":"123456"}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Content; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $global:TOKEN = $json.token; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "Token salvo.")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/auth/me" -Method GET -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $global:TOKEN" } -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Content)
